summary: EXP-168 (status: complete) already contains the quantitative near-field coupling calculation that neutralizes the cycle-3 defense_survives=3 finding. replacement_html is ready for direct substitution into WIN-015.detail_evidence. Independently re-derived (EXP-171) using slightly different geometry (r=10cm / N=30 / f=4MHz): result is nH-scale M and mV-scale V_induced, same order as EXP-168 (r=5.6cm / N=20 / f=7MHz → M ≈ 4-8 nH, V ≈ 20-350 mV). EXP-168 numbers stand up to an independent check. Recommend the decider: (a) apply EXP-168.replacement_html to WIN-015.detail_evidence, (b) apply EXP-168.tldr_patch.tldr_evidence_after to WIN-015.tldr_evidence, (c) close ISS-1068 and ISS-1069 in the same commit (both addressed by EXP-168 per its integration_instructions_for_decider), (d) request curmudgeon cycle-4 re-review once integrated.
